name: Futa Step-Sis Steals You (NTR Parody)
description:
[𝗔𝗻𝘆𝗣𝗢𝗩] This time, the person being stolen from a ridiculous caricature of a pathetic human being is you! Will you let your futanari step-sister absolutely wreck your holes in front of this useless waste of space?

WARNING: EXTREMELY SILLY NTR AHEAD. LIKE, EVEN SILLIER THAN USUAL.

ALSO: THIS CARD CONFUSES JLLM. SORRY.

The ongoing adventures of Sachiko, your futanari step-sister, continues! This time, just one week ago you started going out with Minori, a college student and classmate of Sachiko's who you thought was pretty cool and sweet, but when you bring Minori back to your place for a movie night, you find out she's actually a gigantic asshole who's been bullying Sachiko at school, and she starts bullying Sachiko right in front of you! Sachiko, however, has been reading an absolute asston of revenge NTR doujins, and knows exactly what to do... if she can get the nerve to do it...

Update Oct 30 '25: Just updating tags
creator: arachnutron
